006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.ClosedLoopRampsConfigs;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.CurrentLimitsConfigs;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.FeedbackConfigs;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotionMagicConfigs;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotorOutputConfigs;
015import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.OpenLoopRampsConfigs;
016import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot0Configs;
017import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot1Configs;
018import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot2Configs;
019import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs;
020import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.TalonFXConfiguration;
021import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
022import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.FeedbackSensorSourceValue;
023import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.GravityTypeValue;
024import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.InvertedValue;
025import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue;
026import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
027
028/*-
029 * File containing all of the configurations that different motors require.
030 *
031 * Such configurations include:
032 *  - If it is Inverted
033 *  - The Idle Mode of the Motor
034 *  - The Current Limit
035 *  - The Open Loop Ramp Rate
036 */
037public interface Motors {
038
039        /** Classes to store all of the values a motor needs */
040        public interface Intake {
041
042                TalonFXConfig PIVOT_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
043                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(30)
044                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(40)
045                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
046                                                InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
047                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Brake)
048                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Pivot.GEAR_RATIO)
049                                .withGravityType(GravityTypeValue.Arm_Cosine)
050                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Intake.kP, Gains.Intake.kI, Gains.Intake.kD, 0)
051                                .withFFConstants(
052                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
053                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
054                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
055                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // regular constants
056                                                0)
057                                .withPIDConstants(
058                                                Gains.Intake.Digestion.kP, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kI, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kD, 1)
059                                .withFFConstants(
060                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
061                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
062                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
063                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // digestion constants
064                                                1);
065
066                TalonFXConfig LEFT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
067                                new TalonFXConfig()
068                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
069                                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
070                                                                InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive)
071                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
072                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
073
074                TalonFXConfig RIGHT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
075                                new TalonFXConfig()
076                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
077                                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
078                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
079                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
080        }
081
082        public interface Feeder {
083
084                // TODO: get values after motor pinion swap
085                TalonFXConfig LEADER_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
086                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
087                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
088                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
089                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive);
090        }
091
092        public interface Shooter {
093
094                // TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
095                // .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP, Gains.Shooter.kI, Gains.Shooter.kD, 0)
096                // .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
097                // .withRampRate(0.25)
098                // .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
099                // .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS, Gains.Shooter.kV, Gains.Shooter.kA, 0)
100                // .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
101                // TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT = new TalonFXConfig()
102                // .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP, Gains.Shooter.kI, Gains.Shooter.kD, 0)
103                // .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
104                // .withRampRate(0.25)
105                // .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
106                // .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS, Gains.Shooter.kV, Gains.Shooter.kA, 0)
107                // .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive);
108                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT = new TalonFXConfig()
109                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP, Gains.Shooter.kI, Gains.Shooter.kD, 0)
110                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
111                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
112                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
113                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS, Gains.Shooter.kV, Gains.Shooter.kA, 0)
114                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
115
116                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER = new TalonFXConfig()
117                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP, Gains.Shooter.kI, Gains.Shooter.kD, 0)
118                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
119                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
120                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
121                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS, Gains.Shooter.kV, Gains.Shooter.kA, 0)
122                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
123
124                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT = new TalonFXConfig()
125                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP, Gains.Shooter.kI, Gains.Shooter.kD, 0)
126                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
127                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
128                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
129                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS, Gains.Shooter.kV, Gains.Shooter.kA, 0)
130                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive);
131        }
132
133        public interface Handoff {
134
135                TalonFXConfig HANDOFF_MOTOR_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
136                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
137                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
138                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
139                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
140        }
141
142        public static class TalonFXConfig {
143
144                private final TalonFXConfiguration configuration = new TalonFXConfiguration();
145
146                private final Slot0Configs slot0Configs = new Slot0Configs();
147
148                private final Slot1Configs slot1Configs = new Slot1Configs();
149
150                private final Slot2Configs slot2Configs = new Slot2Configs();
151
152                private final MotorOutputConfigs motorOutputConfigs = new MotorOutputConfigs();
153
154                private final ClosedLoopRampsConfigs closedLoopRampsConfigs = new ClosedLoopRampsConfigs();
155
156                private final OpenLoopRampsConfigs openLoopRampsConfigs = new OpenLoopRampsConfigs();
157
158                private final CurrentLimitsConfigs currentLimitsConfigs = new CurrentLimitsConfigs();
159
160                private final FeedbackConfigs feedbackConfigs = new FeedbackConfigs();
161
162                private final MotionMagicConfigs motionMagicConfigs = new MotionMagicConfigs();
163
164                private final double[] lastKP = new double[3];
165                private final double[] lastKI = new double[3];
166                private final double[] lastKD = new double[3];
167                private final double[] lastKS = new double[3];
168                private final double[] lastKV = new double[3];
169                private final double[] lastKA = new double[3];
170
171                public void updateGainsConfig(
172                                TalonFX motor,
173                                int slot,
174                                DoubleSubscriber kP,
175                                DoubleSubscriber kI,
176                                DoubleSubscriber kD,
177                                DoubleSubscriber kS,
178                                DoubleSubscriber kV,
179                                DoubleSubscriber kA) {
180                        if (slot != 0 && slot != 1 && slot != 2) {
181                                return;
182                        }
183
184                        final double currentKP = kP.get();
185                        final double currentKI = kI.get();
186                        final double currentKD = kD.get();
187                        final double currentKS = kS.get();
188                        final double currentKV = kV.get();
189                        final double currentKA = kA.get();
190
191                        final boolean changed = currentKP != lastKP[slot]
192                                        || currentKI != lastKI[slot]
193                                        || currentKD != lastKD[slot]
194                                        || currentKS != lastKS[slot]
195                                        || currentKV != lastKV[slot]
196                                        || currentKA != lastKA[slot];
197
198                        if (!changed) {
199                                return;
200                        }
201
202                        final SlotConfigs gainConfig = new SlotConfigs()
203                                        .withKP(currentKP)
204                                        .withKI(currentKI)
205                                        .withKD(currentKD)
206                                        .withKS(currentKS)
207                                        .withKV(currentKV)
208                                        .withKA(currentKA);
209
210                        gainConfig.SlotNumber = slot;
211
212                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(gainConfig);
213
214                        lastKP[slot] = currentKP;
215                        lastKI[slot] = currentKI;
216                        lastKD[slot] = currentKD;
217                        lastKS[slot] = currentKS;
218                        lastKV[slot] = currentKV;
219                        lastKA[slot] = currentKA;
220
221                        switch (slot) {
222                                case 0:
223                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot0);
224                                        break;
225                                case 1:
226                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot1);
227                                        break;
228                                case 2:
229                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot2);
230                                        break;
231                        }
232                }
233
234                public TalonFXConfiguration getConfiguration() {
235                        return this.configuration;
236                }
237
238                public void configure(TalonFX motor) {
239                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(configuration);
240                }
241
242                // SLOT 0 CONFIGS
243                public TalonFXConfig withPIDConstants(double kP, double kI, double kD, int slot) {
244                        switch (slot) {
245                                case 0:
246                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
247                                        break;
248                                case 1:
249                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
250                                        break;
251                                case 2:
252                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
253                                        break;
254                        }
255                        return this;
256                }
257
258                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, int slot) {
259                        return withFFConstants(kS, kV, kA, 0, slot);
260                }
261
262                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, double kG, int slot) {
263                        switch (slot) {
264                                case 0:
265                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
266                                        break;
267                                case 1:
268                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
269                                        break;
270                                case 2:
271                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
272                                        break;
273                        }
274                        return this;
275                }
276
277                public TalonFXConfig withGravityType(GravityTypeValue gravityType) {
278                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
279                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
280                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
281                        return this;
282                }
283
284                // MOTOR OUTPUT CONFIGS
285                public TalonFXConfig withInvertedValue(InvertedValue invertedValue) {
286                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withInverted(invertedValue));
287                        return this;
288                }
289
290                public TalonFXConfig withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue neutralMode) {
291                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withNeutralMode(neutralMode));
292                        return this;
293                }
294
295                // RAMP RATE CONFIGS
296                public TalonFXConfig withRampRate(double rampRate) {
297                        closedLoopRampsConfigs
298                                        .withDutyCycleClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
299                                        .withTorqueClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
300                                        .withVoltageClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
301                        openLoopRampsConfigs
302                                        .withDutyCycleOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
303                                        .withTorqueOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
304                                        .withVoltageOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
305                        configuration.withClosedLoopRamps(closedLoopRampsConfigs);
306                        configuration.withOpenLoopRamps(openLoopRampsConfigs);
307                        return this;
308                }
309
310                // CURRENT LIMIT CONFIGS
311                public TalonFXConfig withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
312                        currentLimitsConfigs
313                                        .withStatorCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
314                                        .withStatorCurrentLimitEnable(true);
315                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
316                        return this;
317                }
318
319                public TalonFXConfig withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
320                        currentLimitsConfigs
321                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
322                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimitEnable(true);
323                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
324                        return this;
325                }
326
327                // MOTION MAGIC CONFIGS
328                public TalonFXConfig withMotionProfile(double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration) {
329                        motionMagicConfigs
330                                        .withMotionMagicCruiseVelocity(maxVelocity)
331                                        .withMotionMagicAcceleration(maxAcceleration);
332                        configuration.withMotionMagic(motionMagicConfigs);
333                        return this;
334                }
335
336                // FEEDBACK CONFIGS
337                public TalonFXConfig withRemoteSensor(
338                                int ID, FeedbackSensorSourceValue source, double rotorToSensorRatio) {
339                        feedbackConfigs
340                                        .withFeedbackRemoteSensorID(ID)
341                                        .withFeedbackSensorSource(source)
342                                        .withRotorToSensorRatio(rotorToSensorRatio);
343                        configuration.withFeedback(feedbackConfigs);
344                        return this;
345                }
346
347                public TalonFXConfig withSensorToMechanismRatio(double sensorToMechanismRatio) {
348                        configuration.withFeedback(
349                                        feedbackConfigs.withSensorToMechanismRatio(sensorToMechanismRatio));
350                        return this;
351                }
352        }
353}
